content.full_text:
This is a letter from the California Fair Political Practices Commission dated August 19, 1991, addressed to Nancy Jewell Cross, Chief Executive Officer of Clean Air Transport Systems. The letter responds to Ms. Cross's request for advice and encloses several materials:

1. Notice and Initial Statement of Reasons for proposed Regulation 18704.6.
2. Staff memoranda to Commission dated July 26, 1991 and August 1, 1991.
3. Copy of SB 883.
4. Savage Advice Letter, No. I-90-662a, Follow-Up

The letter states that the Savage Advice Letter, No. 662a has been superseded by subsequent staff advice reflected in the Alperin Advice Letter, No. I-90-662a. Additionally, on August 6, 1991, the Commission approved for notice Regulation 18704.6: Sources of Income to Public Officials Paid to an Agency from Fees.

Ms. Cross expressed interest in being kept informed of the Commission’s advice as it relates to this issue, so her name was placed on the interested persons list.

Sincerely yours,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Deanne Stone
Counsel, Legal Division
